element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First major boss encounter; establishes core fighting mechanic
Deceptive enemy (disguised as Godzilla); reinforces alien threat
Consistent hazard; can be avoided by destroying Mothership in each stage
Biochemical enemy variant; tied to serum mechanic and Dr. Shiragami subplot
Introduces stat enhancement system; prerequisite for Super Godzilla transformation
Egg-hatching time pressure mechanic; escalates environmental stakes
Conditional transformation gate; serum capsules unlock Super Godzilla form
Resurrected/augmented boss; requires Super Godzilla transformation to effectively defeat
Peak difficulty boss; ancient creature enhanced with serum; requires sustained Super form mastery

typical_tension_triggers: map navigation on slow screen (creates friction tension)
Mecha-King Ghidorah city destruction counter (50% threshold)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating map exploration slowdown with intense side-view battle segments; tension maintained through time pressure, energy management, and mandatory boss encounters; relief comes through successful combat or objective completion

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Mothership destruction per stage reduces mandatory UFO encounters; serum capsule collection gates transformation ability

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; King Ghidorah establishes combat baseline; map exploration introduces energy management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; multiple boss variants (Mechagodzilla, Biollante, Battra) introduce fight pattern variety; serum system becomes core progression mechanic
difficulty_curve.late_game: High; Mecha-King Ghidorah requires conditional Super Godzilla form; Bagan represents peak difficulty with sustained enhancement requirements
notable_spikes: Mecha-King Ghidorah transformation gate (capsule collection dependency)
Bagan final battle (enhanced enemy with full serum augmentation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Split-screen design with top showing Godzilla action/location and bottom showing map; player navigates map (criticized as slow/dull by critics) until boss encounter, then switches to side-view fighting segment
Super Godzilla form unlocked conditionally by collecting serum capsules before Mecha-King Ghidorah destroys 50% of city; ties mechanical progression to story pacing
Environmental threat (egg hatching, city destruction) creates urgency for resource collection during exploration phase
UFO encounters can be permanently reduced per stage by locating and destroying Mothership; rewards thorough exploration
